recommendations.title: Of Human Bondage
recommendations.overview: A young man finds himself attracted to a cold and unfeeling waitress who may ultimately destroy them both.

recommendations.title: My First Summer
recommendations.overview: Isolated on a remote property, 16-year-old Claudia finds her world transformed when a spirited girl named Grace wanders into her garden.

recommendations.title: The Mirror Has Two Faces
recommendations.overview: Rose Morgan, who still lives with her mother, is a professor of Romantic Literature who desperately longs for passion in her life. Gregory Larkin, a mathematics professor, has been burned by passionate relationships and longs for a sexless union base

recommendations.title: Plan B
recommendations.overview: Bruno's plan to win back his ex-girlfriend hits a snag when he becomes attracted to her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Beyond the Universe
recommendations.overview: While waiting for a kidney transplant, a young pianist finds an unexpected connection with her doctor — and the courage to fulfill her musical dreams.

recommendations.title: Gabriel's Inferno: Part II
recommendations.overview: Professor Gabriel Emerson finally learns the truth about Julia Mitchell's identity, but his realization comes a moment too late. Julia is done waiting for the well-respected Dante specialist to remember her and wants nothing more to do with him. Can

recommendations.title: Jab We Met
recommendations.overview: A depressed wealthy businessman and a spunky carefree young woman embark on an unexpected journey that changes their lives.

recommendations.title: Shadowlands
recommendations.overview: C.S. Lewis, a world-renowned writer and professor, leads a passionless life until he meets spirited poet Joy Gresham.

recommendations.title: My Rainy Days
recommendations.overview: Because of her past, 17-year-old Rio lives her days filling the emptiness in her heart with money—until one day, she meets a university professor named Kouki and falls in love.

recommendations.title: Le Notti Bianche
recommendations.overview: A middle-aged man meets a young woman who is waiting on a canal bridge for her lover's return.
